newsSince: No new company-specific catalysts since June 9. Q1'26 was reported May 13 (rev $839M, GM 21%, 1.34x book-to-bill, $1.6B backlog) and Q2 guide ($875-905M) was already public. Mid-June EV/industrial power product launches (high-voltage inductors, Gen 7 rectifiers, traction inverter module) are incremental, not estimate-moving.

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha lens: no fresh fundamentals since Jun 9; backlog/book-to-bill unchanged. Direct passives-bottleneck exposure intact but increasingly covered, eroding the 'underfollowed' leg. No news = hold.
verdicts.bull: 1.34x book-to-bill and $1.6B backlog confirm structural passives demand into AI/EV power chains; capacity adds support margin recovery.
verdicts.neutral: Strong order book offset by 21% gross margin and tariff/materials cost drag; no new catalyst since June 9.
verdicts.bear: Crowded after +291% YTD; coverage erodes 'underfollowed' edge and margins remain well below 31-33% targets.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 print confirming backlog conversion and margin recovery
verdicts.primaryRisk: Tariff/materials cost pressure capping margin targets

verdicts.rankRationale: Network-centrality lens: Vishay's node position in AI power chains (passives, discretes, current-sense) is structurally unchanged and no node-level info emerged since June 9. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Broad power-component breadth makes Vishay a near-unavoidable node in AI server PDN and EV power stacks.
verdicts.neutral: Central but commoditized node; cyclical normalization, not a step-change. No new info.
verdicts.bear: Mundane-passives exposure is indirect AI leverage; cyclicality and pricing keep it medium-conviction.

verdicts.rankRationale: Master-list lens: measured rank already reflects balanced AI-server PDN/MLCC/inductor exposure vs the YTD rerating. No fresh fundamentals to re-litigate. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Power-delivery content exposure with double-digit revenue growth and rising backlog.
verdicts.neutral: Positive but measured; execution on discrete power and passives pricing is the swing factor.
verdicts.bear: Far enough from the scarce-bottleneck core that crowding after the rerating caps incremental alpha.
